transcript: Don't know who you are, man.
Yeah, I'm a customer, I had an issue with my lobster I got from ye.
Yeah, from you! This product was woefully inadequate, I’m sorry to say!
Well that’s too bad, because I haven’t sold any lobsters!
Hey, this thing is just not cutting it guy, I came to you, ‘cause my deal is, I only take a bite out of fish from international waters, so I said I'll call Chris, get some lobsters!
[laughing] You can take a bite out of my fucking ass you piece of shit!
What do you want, you fucking freak?
Hey, I've seen lobster rolls bigger than this thing you sold me guy, now whaddya wanna do?
I have a - [laughs] I'm gonna tell you what I'm gonna do.
If I can see you face to face, I'll break your fuckin neck!
look, I'm lookin’ real seriously at whoopin you, ‘cause im fixing to whoop you, ok-k-k-k-k?
[laughing] Come on out, come on, whoop me man.

And hey, what’s with that frozen ziplock stuff you sold me, these scallops, I threw em out the window, Im not gonna lie to you, I can’t exchange them, I just want a refund or a gift caaaird. Can I get a gift card, or-
Go fuck yourself. Go fuck off.
Why don’t you be professional, for a change?
[laughs] fuck off and leave me alone man, I don’t even know who you are.

Yeah, I remember you from a long time back, you fucking freak, you one of them fucking people on the other end of a phone, aggravating somebody. Now why don’t you fuck yourself and find something better to do.
Good, well go fucking buy something!
Listen - listen closely guy, I'm lookin real seriously at whoopin you, you understand?
Oh man I love a good whooping, why don’t you come whoop me, man?
well why don’t you give me a real scallop? How about some real scallops for a change and do your job up here.
I don’t know how-I don’t know-I don’t know scalloping(?)
i’m gonna scallop your lips with my cleats.
Cause im tired of fiddling around. You've been messing me around everytime I come to your stupid place. Each and every time. This lobster’s the size of my thumb nail, here. Am I making sense to you?
Yeah, I hope you choke on it, you hear me?
why don’t you give me a gift card?
Just give me a gift certificate, I'll try it one more time, and that’s THE last time I'm-
I'm not giving you fucking shit, I don’t know who you are, why don’t you leave me the fuck alone?
Hey, I paid cash on the barrel, mister sister.
Good for you! Yeah, cool. N-nice.
I've seen lobster rolls bigger than this lobster you sold me.im just tired of it. It’s a rip off. You're ripping me off, its highway robbery is what I'm talking about.
Guy, I'm gonna whoop ye! You understand me? Next time I see you-or you give me a gift caaaird, it’s your call.
Yeah, well you can go fuck yourself
Why don’t you kiss my ass
Why don’t you go fuck yourself and leave me alone?
Meet me at 11 o’clock tonight, and we’ll work it out. Ok?
And I either want a real lobster or a gift caaaaaaird, ok?
Im a customer! I'm a paying customer over here.

You're a fucking jackass is what you are, and I know who you are. You're either Jerome or the hellfrog and listen, if you wanna whoop me you come whoop me you little crack, I'll be waiting for you, see you later have a good night.
Ill push you into traffic. Im done fussing with youuuu. I'm gone whoop ye-e-e-e-e-e!
hey it’s DR, the doctor, Donnie. You never showed up. You never showed up yesterday, at Yarmoth.
You didn’t tell me, you weren’t in Yarmoth you cocksucker, you.
Fuck off you goddamn fucking freak, you.
Well listen, there was a guy with me, when you sold me the lobster, alright? And he saw what happened-
Is that right? Yeah, well I don’t remember selling you that lobster. Who is this, anyway? Is this the hellfrog or is this the peacock!
You're either one of those fucking perverts.
This is Donnie who? Donnie Hellfrog from East Pumpnicko(?)?
‘Donnie Rolland friend,’ you sound like a peacock to me from fucking ai-a-e [stuttering] horseback
My dad hunts forests of hellfrogs from east Pumpnicko(?), why don’t you go fuck off
Listen. If you don’t fuck off, if I can ever find out who you are, I will pluck your teeth out one by one.

Hey, Chris, my friend Joe was here, he can back up everything I'm saying. He was there the same time as me. Joe, pick up the phone and talk-Chris is on the phone. Hey, he’s getting on the phone right now, you tell him you talked to me, he saw the lobster and everything.
I had to eat borscht and breadcrumbs for dinner after you sold me that-whatever that was there. Joe, pick up the phone!
Criminal. You piece of shit. And You're just a drop dead motherfucking chicken shit piece of shit. You mother fucker piece of shit!
I can fucking hear you too, what do you want?
you were wanting to get lobster? I’m confused as to what’s going on hear.
Drop dead son of a bitch. Drop dead you motherfucker! Drop dead! You piece of shit! Shit! Shit! Shit.

Hello yes, uh, the only good lobster, variation of an entrée that we have is a lobster roll; it’s cold and mayonnaise based on a hot roll. We don’t have any lobster-live lobster or whole-body lobsters, anything of that nature. I can suggest that maybe you can call Scott’s Seafood and they’ll be able to accommodate you on that matter.
Why don’t you all fuck off!
